repo.name: vscode
setup: No dependency setup is required for read-only benchmark inspection.

prompt: Explain how VS Code workbench startup reaches extension host activation and command execution. Cite the source files that support the path.

expected_symbols.name: ExtensionService
expected_symbols.why: Coordinates extension scanning, activation, and host management.

expected_symbols.name: ExtHostCommands
expected_symbols.why: Extension-host-side command registration and execution surface.

expected_claims.text: Workbench startup creates and initializes services before extensions can activate.
ExtensionService coordinates extension lifecycle and communicates with extension host managers.
ExtensionHostManager owns extension host lifecycle and messaging boundaries.
AbstractExtHostExtensionService handles extension activation inside the extension host.
ExtHostCommands owns extension-host command registration and execution behavior.

forbidden_claims.text: The renderer directly executes extension code without an extension host boundary.
VS Code command execution is unrelated to extension activation.

notes: Local-real holdout manifest for the cloned ../vscode checkout at 20ed2bc21d4d73a029b52d3ee6db382ee85c3cca. Keep rows exploratory unless repeated with clean pinned provenance.
